form.formComment: Racing well recently. Most recently 3rd of 12 at Le Lion-d'angers on April 5 over 2000m, 0.9 len behind Exceed The Stars carrying 56.5kg at $2.20. The start before that 2nd of 13 at Chantilly All Weather on March 30 over 1900m, 2 len behind Nazgul Blou carrying 59kg at $3.70. Winning chance.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Last start raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 3 len at Nort-sur-Erdre April 5 over 2500m defeating Malena carrying 58kg. At only start last preparation got back early 6th of 12 at Cagnes-sur-Mer on January 17 over 2150m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind Hepburn with 58kg at $4.30. Can go on with it. Looks hard to beat again.

form.formComment: Returns from a 31-day let-up. At the latest run ran on from midfield and won by 2 len at Limoges March 15 over 2100m defeating Butterfly Nebula with 58kg. The run before that 11th of 15 at Pornichet on February 27 over 1700m, 9 len behind Lotus with 58kg at $27. Fitter and is worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4). Returns from a 31-day let-up. The run before that 11th of 15 at Pornichet on February 27 over 1700m, 9 len behind Lotus with 58kg at $27. Fitter and is worth following up.

form.formComment: At the latest run tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 12 at Saint-Cloud on April 3 over 2400m, slow going 3.5 len behind Northern Territory carrying 55kg at $14. The race before that won by 2 len at Machecoul February 22 over 2350m on a heavy track defeating Exclusive Red carrying 56.5kg at $5.90. Has ability and is among the winning hopes.

form.formComment: At the latest run struggled in the run home; 10th of 12 at Saint-Cloud on April 3 over 2400m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Northern Territory carrying 55.5kg at $58. The race before that got back early 11th of 15 at Saint-Cloud on March 10 over 2000m, slow going 11 len behind Soft Dream carrying 55kg at $26. Form tapering and likely to struggle again.

form.formComment: Resuming after a four-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation second last of 13 at Chantilly All Weather December 6 over 1800m, 10 len behind Arlong Fal with 48kg at $28. On debut tenth of 12 at Clairefontaine August 15 over 1800m, 14 len behind Gua Lipa with 55kg at $12. Can run a good race despite the gap between runs.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 6th of 16 at Pornichet on February 18 over 2100m, 6 len behind Reveur carrying 56.5kg at $28. Last start 9th of 13 at Pornichet on March 25 over 2400m, 3.5 len behind Mooney Vision carrying 56.5kg at $49. Strong contender on her best form.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up ran last of 8 at Chantilly All Weather on February 27 over 1900m, 10 len behind Turbulente carrying 58kg at $51. Last start eased back early on 10th of 13 at Le Croisé-Laroche on March 20 over 1800m, 9 len behind Aqua Aura with 56.5kg at $71. Hard to have on what we have seen since her return.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months ran last of 8 at Saint-Cloud on March 15 over 2000m, on rain affected going; 24 len behind Zaramix carrying 55kg at $85. Previously second-up ran last of 9 at Deauville All Weather on November 1 over 1900m, 8 len behind Lethal Beauty carrying 58kg at $103. Impossible to make a case.

form.formComment: Last start got back early 8th of 10 at Nancy on April 4 over 2500m, on a slow track; 12 len behind Helvetios with 56.5kg at $15. The run before that ran on from midfield; 2nd of 10 at Limoges on March 15 over 2100m, 2 len behind Glenmore carrying 55kg. Major player on best form.
